memoryArtifacts.headline: Blason de la Maison de Toucy
memoryArtifacts.description:
Blason de la Maison de Toucy
De gueules, à trois pals de vair, au chef d'or chargé de quatre merlettes de gueules.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengarde de Toucy於1125年出生在法國布格圖希時，她的父親Ithier de Toucy III23歲，母親Elisabeth de Joigny25歲。她和Guillaume Ier de Dampierre至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1190年在法國哈帕格享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Cecile, Lucien, Gilles, Normand, Marcel, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Laurent, Alphonse.
French: habitational name from Soucy, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Soucie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Ludger, Pierre.

nameMeanings.name: Ermengarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengarde de Toucy was born in 1125, in Toucy, Yonne, Burgundy, France, her father, Ithier de Toucy III, was 23 and her mother, Elisabeth de Joigny, was 25. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Guillaume Ier de Dampierre. She died in 1190, in Champagne, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengarde de Toucy est née en 1125, à Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, son père, Ithier de Toucy III, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Joigny, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Guillaume Ier de Dampierre. Elle est décédée en 1190, à Champagne, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermengarde de Toucy 1125 in Toucy, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ithier de Toucy III 23 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de Joigny 25. Sie hatte mit Guillaume Ier de Dampierre mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1190 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Champagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de Toucy è nata il nel 1125 nel Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Ithier de Toucy III, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de Joigny, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Guillaume Ier de Dampierre. Morì nel 1190, nel Champagne, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Toucyが1125年にフランスボウルゴグンイオントウシで生まれた時，父Ithier de Toucy IIIは23歳，母Elisabeth de Joignyは25歳であった。彼女はGuillaume Ier de Dampierreとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1190年にフランスチャンプアグンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Toucy(이)가 1125년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 토우시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ithier de Toucy III(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de Joigny(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume Ier de Dampierre(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1190년 프랑스 챔파그니에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde de Toucy nasceu em 1125, em Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Ithier de Toucy III, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Joigny, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Guillaume Ier de Dampierre. Ela faleceu em 1190, em Champagne, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermengarde de Toucy родилась в 1125 г. в местности тоуси, енн, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Ithier de Toucy III было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Joigny, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Guillaume Ier de Dampierre. Она умерла в 1190 г. в местности чампагн, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ermengarde de Toucy nació en 1125, en Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Ithier de Toucy III, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Joigny, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Guillaume Ier de Dampierre. Murió en 1190, en Champagne, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
